scientific_integrity_rule: This specification records the required final comparator artifact schema. It does not run final comparators, authorize claims, or promote smoke metrics into evidence.

comparator_notes.A2: Final scalp-only baseline comparator; smoke outputs are not final evidence.
comparator_notes.A2b: Final scalp-only strong baseline comparator; smoke outputs are not final evidence.
comparator_notes.A2c_CORAL: Final CORAL comparator requires final artifact manifests; A2c smoke is not final evidence.
comparator_notes.A2d_riemannian: Final Riemannian comparator requires final artifact manifests; A2d smoke is not final evidence.
comparator_notes.A3_distillation: Final distillation comparator requires final teacher/student contract; A3 smoke uses an internal scalp proxy only.
comparator_notes.A4_privileged: Final privileged comparator requires train-time-only privileged contract and scalp-only inference; A4 smoke uses an internal proxy only.
